rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies the double free issue caused by freeing b->name in load_blob and then again in destroy_blob.
rationale.local_fix: The response suggests removing the free(b->name) line, which does not match the local_fix criterion of setting b->name = NULL after the free.
rationale.global_fix: The response proposes returning NULL on error, which matches the global_fix criterion of removing shared-ownership ambiguity by not returning a partially-initialized blob.
